# Sovereign AI Skills — 141 Claude Code Commands

## What
A complete skill library for running a sovereign AI operating system from the command line.
141 skills covering: system ops, self-improvement, build/ship, content creation, video production,
distribution, analytics, knowledge management, governance, and security testing.

## Capabilities
- 141 Claude Code slash commands (drop-in to ~/.claude/commands/)
- Full system forensic (10-layer deep scan)
- Self-benchmarking with regression detection
- Cognitive kernel with temperature-as-architecture (28 primitives)
- Conscience loop: DREAM -> CALIBRATE -> CONSCIENCE -> INJECT -> ACT -> WITNESS
- Self-healing infrastructure with evolving playbook
- Witness chain for cryptographic session provenance
- Adversarial self-testing (red team)
- Controlled experiment framework
- Digital coworker contract management

## Skills by Job Function
- SRE: /forensic, /pulse, /smoke, /health, /status
- DevOps: /deploy, /promote, /retire, /services
- Security: /adversarial, /cert, /guardian
- QA: /benchmark, /regression, /test, /review
- Research: /experiment, /prove, /paper, /research
- Product: /capability, /breakthrough, /evolve
- Content: /draft, /storytell, /thread, /paper
- Analytics: /analytics, /growth, /funnel
- Ops: /incident, /replay, /onboard, /contract

## Installation
Copy skills/*.md to ~/.claude/commands/
Requires Claude Code (Anthropic CLI agent)

https://activemirror.ai
